name: Python Core Image Load Detected
notes:
This rule detects Python Core image load.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Patrick St. John, OTR (Open Threat Research)
SIGMA Title: Python Py2Exe Image Load
SIGMA Description: Detects the image load of Python Core indicative of a Python script bundled with Py2Exe.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Audit.Object Load Success

when the event matches LOWER("Description") LIKE '%python core%' AND ( LOWER("Process Full Full Name") NOT LIKE '%python%' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") NOT LIKE '%c:\program files\%' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") NOT LIKE '%c:\program files (x86)\%' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") NOT LIKE '%c:\programdata\anaconda3\%' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Python Core Image Load Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Audit.Object Load Success

AND when the event matches LOWER("Description") LIKE '%python core%' AND  ( 	LOWER("Process Full Full Name") NOT LIKE '%python%' 	AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") NOT LIKE '%c:\program files\%' 	AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") NOT LIKE '%c:\program files (x86)\%' 	AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") NOT LIKE '%c:\programdata\anaconda3\%' ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Python Core Image Load Detected
Event description: Detects Python Core image load.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
